narrative:
Paint Township has 1,016 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.0 percentage points.
